sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28239" key="dragateu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δραγατεύω</orth>, <sense id="n28239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a watcher of a field</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vineyard</tr_> (cf. Mod. Gr. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δραγάτης</foreign>)<cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, Ἀρχ.Ἐφ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1913.27</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Thess.).</sense> </entryFree>
